---
title: 'Facit til forløbet \"Cambridge Analytica skandalen - matematik\"'
description: ''
image: ""
categories:
---


::: {.callout-note collapse="true" appearance="minimal"}  
### Facit -- opgave 3

- $$
   \frac{\partial}{\partial w_1} (w_0 + w_1 \cdot x_1 + w_2 \cdot x_2 + \cdots + w_6 \cdot x_6) = x_1
   $$
   
- $$
   \frac{\partial}{\partial w_1} \sigma (w_0 + w_1 \cdot x_1 + w_2 \cdot x_2 + \cdots + w_6 \cdot x_6) = o \cdot (1-o) \cdot x_1
   $$   
   hvor 
   
   $$
   o = \sigma (w_0 + w_1 \cdot x_1 + w_2 \cdot x_2 + \cdots + w_6 \cdot x_6)
   $$
- $$
   \frac{\partial E}{\partial w_1} \sigma (w_0 + w_1 \cdot x_1 + w_2 \cdot x_2 + \cdots + w_6 \cdot x_6) = (t-o) \cdot o \cdot (1-o) \cdot x_1
   $$
:::



::: {.callout-note collapse="true" appearance="minimal"}  
### Facit -- opgave 

:::



::: {.callout-note collapse="true" appearance="minimal"}  
### Facit -- opgave 

:::



::: {.callout-note collapse="true" appearance="minimal"}  
### Facit -- opgave 

:::



::: {.callout-note collapse="true" appearance="minimal"}  
### Facit -- opgave 

:::



::: {.callout-note collapse="true" appearance="minimal"}  
### Facit -- opgave 

:::
